summary: EXP-267 (this run) replaces the misattributed 'no physical mechanism' paragraph in §4.2.2 with a structural-critique paragraph that quotes the dome's actual Tier 1 disclosure verbatim ('Globe prediction: 0.0 nT systematic (or ionospheric Sq disruption — competing mechanism exists, see WIN-068 honest caveat).') and pivots to the footnote-vs-operational-rule distinction. Verified live on 2026-04-27 by analyst (curl confirmed predictions.html line 113 matches; 'no physical mechanism' phrase confirmed absent from dome material; phrase appears in dome content only for gravity Tier 2/3 as 'cannot produce' / 'no mechanism'). Decider can close ISS-1602 once EXP-267 integrates into part4.html.
